notes: Five-step wizard with Step 2.5 (live-account confirmation) as a conditional gate. Sandbox pre-selected. Saved-connections table sits below and refreshes after each save. Radios must be keyboard-activatable.
review_criteria: Design each of the five steps + the live-confirmation subscreen on desktop and 375px mobile
Radio cards must clearly indicate keyboard focus
Live-confirmation subscreen must render Legal's warning inline; leave no room for the user to miss it
